name: Badr ibn Maaqil
title: Mujahid of Ju'fi
shortDescription: A brave man from the Ju'fi tribe who answered the Imam's call, fought valiantly on Ashura, and was martyred.
fullStory:
Badr ibn Ma'qil al-Ju'fi was a renowned Shia and warrior from the Ju'fi tribe. When he heard the news of the Master of Martyrs' (AS) caravan arriving in Karbala, despite the siege and strict control over Kufa, he managed to reach the Imam.

On Ashura, Badr, with overflowing love for the Prophet's family, lined up against the armies of disbelief and hypocrisy. He defended the tents with all his might during the enemy's first attack (morning shower of arrows).

After a brave fight, Badr ibn Ma'qil attained martyrdom alongside a group of Imam Hussain's (AS) loyal companions.

His name is mentioned in authentic Ziyarats like Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya, where the infallible Imam sends greetings to this brave devotee of Wilayah.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلَى بَدْرِ بْنِ مَعْقِلِ الجُعْفِيِّ...
quote: (Ziyarat al-Rajabiyya:) Peace be upon Badr ibn Ma'qil al-Ju'fi...
